element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Required for solving stage-specific obstacles and later boss encounters

element_introduction_order.element: Mega Man charge shot (if Mega Man chosen)
Bass rapid-fire multi-directional shots (if Bass chosen)

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Essential for navigating Bass-specific platforming challenges
Enables dash-jump technique for traversing gaps
Requires adaptation of platforming and weapon strategies

element_introduction_order.first_appears: End of each of 8 initial stages
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Critical encounters; defeating grants signature weapons for stage selection flexibility
Mid-game final boss with shield mechanic requiring Proto Man intervention
Ultimate final boss; narrative revelation of King's true origin

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platform sections between enemy gauntlets
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive intensity with escalation from stage enemies to Robot Masters to King to Wily; difficulty spike noted as steep across whole game

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundation stage introduces character mechanics and basic enemies; difficulty determined by character choice (Mega Man vs Bass handle obstacles differently)
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Robot Master stages escalate with stage-specific hazards and enemy combinations; character-specific weapons unlock strategic flexibility
difficulty_curve.late_game: King castle infiltration introduces shielded boss with multi-phase combat; Wily confrontation demands mastery of acquired weapons and platforming
notable_spikes: Transition from Robot Master stages to King encounter (shield mechanic introduces new defensive challenge)
Wily boss fight requiring weapon selection strategy
Overall difficulty noted by critics as 'too steep' for target demographic

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 8 Robot Master stages features unique environmental challenges and hazard combinations; stages reward weapon selection (acquired from other Robot Masters)
Mega Man uses charge-shot and slide mechanics; Bass uses double-jump and dash-jump for crossing gaps and reaching elevated areas; same stages demand different spatial strategies
Defeating Robot Masters grants signature weapons that solve stage-specific obstacles; encourages stage order non-linearity and weapon experimentation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any stage after first Robot Master acquisition

notable_level_patterns.description: King and Wily encounters feature state changes (King's shield removal by Proto Man; Wily's power restoration) that alter combat pacing and strategy
